VAL-UNI-001.evidence: Source review of src/lib/uniswap/client.ts + tsc --noEmit exit 0
VAL-UNI-001.notes: UniswapClient class exports checkApproval(), getQuote(), executeSwap(), and createOrder() methods corresponding to /check_approval, /quote, /swap, and /order endpoints. All requests go to UNISWAP_TRADE_API_BASE_URL (https://trade-api.gateway.uniswap.org/v1). API key sent via x-api-key header. Full TypeScript types (CheckApprovalRequest/Response, QuoteRequest/Response, SwapRequest/Response, OrderRequest/Response, SupportedChainId, etc.) are defined in types.ts. TypeScript compiles without errors.

VAL-UNI-002.evidence: Source review of src/lib/uniswap/swap.ts and src/lib/uniswap/client.ts + tsc --noEmit exit 0
VAL-UNI-002.notes: The swap() function in swap.ts accepts tokenIn, tokenOut, amount, chainId (SupportedChainId), and walletAddress parameters. It calls client.getQuote() which constructs a QuoteRequest body containing: type, amount, tokenInChainId, tokenOutChainId, tokenIn, tokenOut, swapper (recipient). The QuoteRequest type in types.ts matches the Uniswap Trade API schema including chainId, tokenIn, tokenOut, amount, and recipient (swapper). The swap function chains check_approval → quote → swap/order. TypeScript compiles without errors.

VAL-DELEG-001.evidence: Source review of src/lib/delegations/framework.ts + tsc --noEmit exit 0
VAL-DELEG-001.notes: Module exports: createDelegation(from, to, permissions, parentDelegationId?), revokeDelegation(delegationId), getDelegationStatus(delegationId), listDelegations(walletAddress), getDelegation(delegationId), clearDelegations(). TypeScript types (Delegation, Permission, DelegationStatus, SpendLimit, TimeWindow, SpendPeriod) are fully defined in types.ts. Permission type includes spendLimit, recipientWhitelist, timeWindow, and taskPermissions. TypeScript compiles without errors.

VAL-DELEG-002.evidence: Source review of src/lib/delegations/chains.ts + tsc --noEmit exit 0
VAL-DELEG-002.notes: Module exports buildDelegationChain(ceoWallet, departmentAgent, taskAgent, ceoPermissions, departmentPermissions) which creates a 3-level hierarchical delegation chain (CEO → department → task_agent). Also exports restrictPermissions(parent, child) which enforces least-privilege by: capping spendLimit.amount to parent's amount, intersecting recipientWhitelist entries, tightening timeWindow to overlap, and intersecting taskPermissions. Permission objects contain spendLimit (amount, currency, period), recipientWhitelist (string[]), timeWindow (start, end), and taskPermissions (string[]). Returns DelegationChain with ordered DelegationChainNode[]. TypeScript compiles without errors.

VAL-PAY-002.evidence: Source review of src/lib/x402/payment.ts and src/lib/x402/constants.ts + tsc --noEmit exit 0

In constants.ts, USDC_TOKEN_ADDRESS is constructed as '0x' + 'af88d065e77c8cC2239327C5EDb3A432268e5831' = '0xaf88d065e77c8cC2239327C5EDb3A432268e5831' which matches the required Arbitrum USDC address. USDC_DECIMALS = 6. TypeScript compiles without errors.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: all 8 passed. All modules export the required functions/classes with correct TypeScript types. API keys are sourced from the correct VITE_ environment variables. Endpoint URLs, chain IDs, and token addresses match specifications. TypeScript compilation (tsc --noEmit) exits cleanly with code 0.
